title: DefaultXL
description:
Minecraft vanilla improved!

This resource pack enhances the classic Minecraft aesthetic with selective texture updates, Stardew Valley-inspired GUI, OptiFine-enhanced features like more mob varieties and custom enchantment book textures, and much more!
body:
This resource pack is designed to preserve the classic vanilla Minecraft aesthetic while enhancing it with thoughtful improvements and creative additions. It’s perfect for players who appreciate the original look of Minecraft but desire more detail and variety without a complete overhaul.

To get all features of this resource pack, you need to download these mods:

[Cull Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-leaves)

[Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

[Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)

(If you use **Forge** then use OptiFine instead, along side a Leaf Culling mod.)

Key Features:

**Selective Texture Overhaul:** While not every texture and model in Minecraft has been changed, a significant number have been carefully reimagined to provide a fresh experience while maintaining the game’s original charm.

**3D Models:** Enhanced 3D models add depth and realism to certain blocks and items, giving your world a more detailed and immersive feel.

**Stardew Valley-Inspired GUI:** The graphical user interface has been revamped with a Stardew Valley-inspired design, offering a nostalgic and cozy vibe that fans of the game will appreciate.

**OptiFine-Enhanced Features:** When paired with OptiFine, this pack unlocks additional features, including more mob varieties, health bars, custom enchantment book textures, and more, adding further depth and customization to your gameplay experience.

**Selective Music Updates:** While not every piece of music has been changed, some tracks, such as Music Disc 13, feature new and unique music that add a fresh feel to your gameplay.

**Highlight: Double Slab Block Textures**
One of the standout features of this pack is the unique double slab block textures. In vanilla Minecraft, placing two slabs on top of each other creates a regular full-sized block. With this texture pack, instead of the slabs merging into the standard block, they combine to form a new variant with its own distinct texture. This feature adds more variety to your builds, allowing for greater creativity and a more dynamic visual experience.

Why Download This Pack?

If you’re looking for a resource pack that stays true to the original Minecraft experience while offering selective enhancements and unique features, this pack is for you. It’s ideal for players who want to refresh their world without losing the nostalgic charm of vanilla Minecraft. Whether you’re a seasoned builder or a new player, this pack adds depth, variety, and a touch of creativity to every corner of your world.
